pkgmetadata.longdescription: Prebuilt binary distribution of Betterbird, a fine-tuned community fork of Mozilla Thunderbird with additional features, bug fixes and usability improvements. This package installs the official upstream Linux x86_64 build, avoiding the long Firefox/Thunderbird compilation required by a source build.

use.flag: Enable native Wayland support (set MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1 at runtime)
